reviews.review_description: It was the best platform for video creation on quest. Sadly it is shout down and not working anymore
Honestly not the best, but can't really complain since it's free. Just saying, interface is a bit hard to understand, and I'd prefer if the movement was on the left stick instead of the right.
It is so glitchy and I never play because of that. So can you please fix it

So sorry to inform you but the game has been frustrating probably for ton of people including me. So here what we gonna do. You need to put the expression menu on the right controller. and movement on the left controller. Next when you walk forwards, and then you look behind you, your character will not walk where you face. and instead will look possesed. Next it's hard to turn left and right while you smooth-move. and yes i'm talking about smooth-move not teleportation. So you can't turn quickly left and right. but take long time to turn while you walk. also when you grab an item in your hand that has the control to move. you can't move anymore. so fix so when you hold an item. you can actually use it and walk with it with two hands full. Those need to be added and fixed. Atleast add these. And see the result. Trust me *team* it'll make the game a lot better.

So flipside studio never put early acces. And depsite all of that this looks worse. No uptades nor no improvements. I can't expect them to listen to this because "obviously". But i have some hope because this is the only game where i can animate avatars and stuff.
It won't let me join pepoole

Flipside is the best tool I've ever used for creation.. what ill like to see now is a feature where I can actually have someone outside vr projected on a tv screen. Just like in Streamlabs where they have virtual cameras. Imagine if i can  discuss with someone who's not on vr by simply sending them a link and they can join me and I can put them on a tv screen... consider this please
It really needs updated.  If it can adopt the use of the Meta avatars that would be great.

The concept is great and the tools too, I have an important project for school and the app isn’t working is FULL OF GLITCHES makes it impossible to use it frozens every 3 seconds i will appreciate that the app get fixed ASAP i really need it.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear it's being glitchy for you. We just pushed a new update, not sure if it'll help, but if you can email us at support@flipsidexr.com and include which headset version you're using we can try to help figure out how to get it working smoothly for you.

reviews.review_description: It keeps glitching I had high hopes about this and it did not work please fix this

First of all, this is a Video Creation Tool, not a game. Think of it as a movie/TV studio. It's a full blow studio, complete with multi-camera, teleprompter, green screen, lighting, sets, and more. Anything you would find on a real set. But YOU have to bring the imagination. This is not a game that is going to PULL you through the creation process. It's an amazing app that is only going to get better.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive words! Our team really appreciates it <3

reviews.review_description: I only gave this 1 star because I can't even play this. Every time I go into it, the game freezes, and it happens every second. I'm sure this game has a lot of potential, but I can't seem to get it to work without freezing! Help?

developer_response.body: We're sorry you're having trouble with Flipside. If you email support@flipsidexr.com we can try to help get things working for you.

reviews.review_description: This game is free and I want a refund
There is almost nothing to do

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that was your experience. Flipside mainly offers two things to do: 1) create immersive content that you act out (including with friends), and 2) watch content that others have made. If you're interested in seeing what others come up with or acting out sketches, jokes, etc., then Flipside is for you. But Flipside isn't just a general purpose game or open world. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_title: BEST GAME TO HANGOUT AND HAVE FUN
reviews.review_description: When I got this I was confused but when I did stuff I loved it ILL RATE IT 5 STARS🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🗿🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
Can you add a lay thing there’s beds but i cannot lay on them

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feature request. We do plan to add more ways to control characters and have them in more positions in the future. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: First game we got and it’s the worst.  Consistently glitches and nothing works.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you're having trouble with our app. If you can email your issues to support@flipsidexr.com or post them on our community Discord server, we would love a chance to figure out what's going wrong and try to fix it.

reviews.review_title: Great App Using Windows Comp Tool
reviews.review_description: I found this app exciting only to find it is used with another app tool only compatible with Windows. The means for recording and using your creations is clumsy on the Mac.

reviews.review_title: The Best Studio Production app in VR
reviews.review_description:
Have you ever wanted to create studio quality content from your own home? Do you have a business that needs professional video content for a film, series or Facebook ad? This is absolutely the app you need.

I've been in the entertainment industry for 20 years as an actor and stand up comedian. I've produced hundreds of hours in professional video content. Flipside is like having a multimillion dollar film studio in your house! 

I started my first virtual venue using Flipside called The Unknown Comedy Club which produces B2B comedy shows for remote workers all over North America. Flipsides support team is incredibly efficient and responsive which is why this app is core to my business. 

The fact that this app is free is utter madness. If you can use this incredible tool, I suggest you download it immediately.

Welcome back, Flipside!
I tried Flipside with PC-based VR before Covid, but lost interest because I didn't get the point. Today I recognise its usefulness, especially in providing an alternative to the silly meta-avatar world. So let's hope it develops into a more professional alternative.

developer_response.body: Hey gbguck, we're back in business! That's right.  Now with Meta Quest 2 users, the opportunity to collaborate and create together can happen more frequently.  We're excited to see that you can see the potential.

reviews.review_description: This is going to be great! I am not a creator and have 0 experience with anything like this. I am however quite the story teller and this looked like a fun way to expand on that. I’m 43 and assumed I would get frustrated right away  and boy was I wrong!  In 30 mins I had made a couple of short simple clips and I can’t wait to get back in there to play around!  I have a feeling it’s only going to get better and better as they add more features. I would like to see an easier way to share creations and a quick way to access a browser from within the app to easily play say YouTube clips on the news screen or being able to access shared media files on the headset. Maybe there is and I just havnt found it yet. I’m going to have a blast figuring it out though!  Great job! Do yourself a favor and download it!!!

developer_response.body: We have 40 years olds working on our team and we completely understand how people can perceive that you have to be young to make avatar-based content because the tech is too "hard."  Thanks for following your curiosity and giving it a go!

reviews.review_description:
This app was due to be released for the Quest 2 years ago. I expected major changes for the better. Sadly there are minor refinements but no upgrades to the UI or basic functionality. I have no doubt you can have some fun with it but if you want true flexibility you need a better option, which for better or worse ( well, not worse ) right now is VRChat which is much more sophisticated in every way. You can't even use smooth movement in Flipside - it's all teleporting just like 2019.
Also, having your devs leave a glowing review is sketchy.

For me who was looking for an app to make marketing ads, it’s great. You can be the one you want, you dream of doing TV, that’s it. For the developers a suggestion: couldn’t you add interactive objects like a flying pool or radios in which we can pre-record background music? And more important if we could retransmit video recorded directly in the genre scene we could watch a real video in a scene and incorporate it into our own scenes, an example for its use would be a TV presenter who cuts the video and transmits a real report of real life before returning to another camera. And yes please another option such as the possibility of seeing his correspondents when we do a live for example on Facebook with different screens for each real person and us with our avatar! Even if you do it in addition I would be ready to pay

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and all the ideas.  We'll be sure to take your suggestions into our feedback process.

reviews.review_description: Dear Flipside Studio, I enjoy your game a bunch. There are some things that were confusing to me that I think you should've added in the 'Help' section of dashboard. The slides, I did not know how to import them. But overall I think it is a cool game, just need to fix some height bugs, and more things in 'Help' section of the dashboard. Once, you fix those these this game will definitely be 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words.  Appreciate hearing where things were confusing and how we can improve -  helps us when making future updates.  If you're ever stuck on something, head over to our Discord - https://discord.com/invite/S2TX7HR. Always someone to help over there :)

reviews.review_description: I was so excited to start creating my environment and character to start recording videos until I got to the tools and unity hub download. I'm so confused. I honestly would just like to know how to upload slides to the tv/ projector. This app seems great just for a beginner creator like myself the unity hub/ creative tools lost me..

developer_response.body:
Sorry you're having troubles with Unity. You do need Unity and Flipside Creator Tools to bring your own characters, sets and props into Flipside Studio, but we have some resources on our website and walkthroughs on our Youtube channel that might help!  Here's a good place to start - https://www.flipsidexr.com/docs/2023.1/creator-tools/getting-started. If you have specific questions, head over to our Discord and someone will be there to help - http://bit.ly/3GB0Izx

If you're looking to load slides into the slideshow prop or a slideshow that comes with one of our pre-loaded sets, that's done through the Creator Portal on our website.  Details here - https://www.flipsidexr.com/docs/2023.1/studio/how-tos/show-tools/how-to-use-the-slideshow

Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: Really nice. I started to use it and it has a lot of potential. I am missing the possibility of using the Meta avatars and the face recognition in Quest Pro. Also it would be great if we had the broadcaster version for Mac.

developer_response.body: We hear you loud and clear.  We're working on additional avatar integrations and we'll share more when we are closer to releasing those features.

reviews.review_description: Every time I launch the game it crashes mid load. I uninstalled and reinstalled it but it still does not work

developer_response.body: Hey Mc_Lovin09.  Have you tried re-installing?  We haven't had this issue reported to us and we would love to help you get into the app.  You can reach out support@flipsidexr.com if seek more help.

reviews.review_description: The app seems easy to use. I've tested some of it's features. Is there a way though to access the internet from inside the app? Like a browser or access a youtube video inside it? Other than that, this seems like a solid software.
Excited to have download it pretty cool and fun to play with looking forward to create my first Show.lol now need new friends to interact with.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review!  If you're looking for collaborators, head over to our Discord - http://bit.ly/3GB0Izx! We just started a new #collabs channel for people trying to connect.

reviews.review_description: ￼ it is so mini bad kids on their ￼

developer_response.body: Eek! Are you sure you were in Flipside Studio?  With our multiplayer collaborations you decide who you're connecting with, so it's all in your control :).  Let us know if you have any questions on how things work.  Happy to help.

reviews.review_description: It is a very nice Video Creator Studio App. Nice to use even on the Quest!

developer_response.body: Thanks, DocAKIA.  It was a lot of hard work getting the cameras and production tools optimized for the Quest 2 and we're glad you are enjoying it!

reviews.review_title: I Am the best at making videos
reviews.review_description:
I have to be in the game now 
😁😘😙

developer_response.body: We're looking forward to what you make!

reviews.review_description: yummy app 🤭
If you can make it, make it. If not, add a toy gun. And most of the items that shoot don't work. Please reply again.
I love this it's calm and nice great job

it would be more awesome if we can use our avatars for this and we can use custom made scenes (backgrounds). there are bugs in there like when u want to register your play, then oh, where’s the set up?  no more table and objects.  then i have to do them all over again.  besides all this, i love it
So I was thinking could you add a ragdoll mode for the puppet? That way we can do much better death scenes and you can activate it by pressing either x or b

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feature suggestion! That is something we'd like to explore at some point for sure. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I don’t usually write reviews but this game earned it, me and my friends have so much fun just messing around in this game and making videos, great time w your friends, but wouldn’t recommend solo.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive words!

reviews.review_description: Me and my friends hosted a talk show and we all loved it.

I love this. I do believe that it would be a lot better if we could use our own avatars or, at least customize the ones we can use and beable to change their cloths. But other than that, it's a really good app that you guys should try.  Also, if anyone knows how to get your podcast sync to your phone so I can put it up there. Please let me know.

reviews.review_title: Closer & closer to be d best of d Best
reviews.review_description:
The new AI HDR scenarios are one of the best examples of seamless AI integration in an app. The scripts are much more useful and easy to use than I imagine and there are very, very few problems in regular use. I still feel like I lost track of where to press or found things in the main menu, like safe stuff, close and protect, open a new project, etc.
And the best of all is the great discord community to learn, ask, solve and share, thanks!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and I'm glad to hear that you are getting support from our Discord community.  We are always making improvements and you're feedback is valuable!
